bullets.body: **Inihayag ang CSAI Foundation bilang MITRE-authorized CVE Numbering Authority (CNA) noong Apr 29 — unang agentic-AI-specific CVE issuer; STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex (4-phase rollout June 2026 → Dec 2027 naka-align sa NIST AI RMF / EU AI Act / ISO/IEC 42001); AARM specification (ipinasa ng Vanta) + ATF stewardship (lumipat mula MassiveScale.AI)** — Institutional landing ng agentic-AI threat-class bilang first-class disclosure regime, parallel sa Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 named-techniques wave.

citations.label: CSA - CSAI Foundation Announces Key Milestones to Secure the Agentic Control Plane

bullets.body: **MITRE ATT&CK v19 (Apr 28) carry-forward — hinati ang Defense Evasion (TA0005) sa Stealth (TA0005) + Defense Impairment (TA0112); idinagdag ng v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning / tool invocation abuse / MCP server compromise / malicious agent deployment bilang named techniques** — Structural validation ng agent-skills threat-class.

**arxiv 2604.24026 — "From Skill Text to Skill Structure: The Scheduling-Structural-Logical (SSL) Representation for Agent Skills"** — Unang structured representation para sa agent skill artifacts. Carry-forward sa skills-as-product wave.

citations.label: arXiv - SSL Representation for Agent Skills

bullets.body: **arxiv 2604.25562 — "SnapGuard: Lightweight Prompt Injection Detection for Screenshot-Based Web Agents"** — Lightweight screenshot-based detector para sa prompt injection sa web agents; nakatutok sa Cisco-RSAC-prompt-injection 36% baseline.

**arxiv 2604.01194 — "AgentWatcher: A Rule-based Prompt Injection Monitor"** — Output-attribution sa causally-influential context segments; tinutugunan ang long-context degradation problem sa existing detectors.

**arxiv 2604.15368 — "LogJack: Indirect Prompt Injection Through Cloud Logs Against LLM Debugging Agents"** — Cloud logs bilang previously-unevaluated indirect-prompt-injection surface; command execution rates 0.0% hanggang 86.2% sa iba't ibang model classes.

sections.category: LLM Workflow > OpenClaw / NemoClaw / Hermes Agents

bullets.body: **OpenAI Agents SDK update noong Apr 30 — model-native harness, native sandbox execution; sandbox providers Blaxel / Cloudflare / Daytona / E2B / Modal / Runloop / Vercel; Python muna, susunod ang TypeScript; configurable memory + sandbox-aware orchestration + Codex-style filesystem tools** — Sandbox-execution ay default primitive na sa OpenAI stack na may pitong third-party sandbox providers bilang first-class deployment targets.

citations.label: OpenAI - The next evolution of the Agents SDK

bullets.body: **Inilabas ang OpenAI Codex CLI 0.128.0-alpha.1 noong Apr 30 — nagdagdag ng `/goal`, in-app browser para sa local-dev / file-backed pages, Unix-socket app-server transport, sticky environments; pag-aari ng model providers ang model discovery (na nagpapakita ng AWS/Bedrock account state sa app clients); rollout tracing + multi-agent debug reducer; na-update ang bundled OpenAI Docs skill para sa GPT-5.5 / gpt-image-2** — Developer-side companion sa Apr 28 Bedrock launch.

**Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA (Apr 3) carry-forward + Foundry Toolkit for VS Code GA + Toolbox in Foundry preview + hosted agents sa Foundry Agent Service preview + Observability sa Foundry Control Plane GA** — Vendor-side answer ng Microsoft sa Apr 28 Bedrock AgentCore + Apr 28 Novita Sandbox layer; nakatutok ang Agent Framework sa .NET + Python; nasa loob ng VS Code ang Foundry Toolkit.

citations.label: Microsoft - Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 inside Foundry

bullets.body: **Novita Sandbox (Apr 28) carry-forward — Firecracker microVM, sub-200ms cold-start, ~1s state-checkpoint resume; OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent-runtime targets; positioned sa Gartner's "55% of AI agent rollouts will be delayed for security reasons" framing** — Standing reference para sa agent-runtime hardening wave; pinupunan ang OpenAI Agents SDK Apr 30 + Microsoft Foundry hosted agents Apr 30.

citations.label: PR Newswire - Novita AI Launches Sandbox to Secure OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, and Autonomous Systems

bullets.body: **Hermes Agent v0.11.0 (Apr 23) carry-forward — Ink-based React TUI + Python JSON-RPC backend, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 sa pamamagitan ng Codex OAuth, 5 bagong inference paths, ika-17 messaging platform (QQBot), webhook direct-delivery zero-LLM push, shell-hooks lifecycle integration; 111K+ GitHub stars** — Standing baseline.

**Nagpapatuloy ang OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train; 346K+ GitHub stars; NVIDIA NemoClaw early-preview Mar 16 carry-forward papuntang Apr 28-30** — Standing reference para sa open-source agentic harness ecosystem.

**Multica v0.2.20 (Apr 29 09:40 UTC) carry-forward papuntang Apr 30-May 1 — open-source vendor-neutral self-hosted orchestrator; pinapalitan ang v0.2.19 (Apr 28) + v0.2.18 (Apr 27)** — Standing baseline; news-driven coverage ayon sa project memory.

**Nailunsad ang OpenAI sa AWS Bedrock noong Apr 28 (limited preview) — GPT-5.5 / OpenAI frontier models sa Bedrock; Codex sa Bedrock para sa 4M+ weekly Codex users; Bedrock Managed Agents na pinapagana ng OpenAI (binuo gamit ang OpenAI harness); ang paggamit ng OpenAI models + Codex ay nag-aapply sa existing AWS commitments; full IAM / PrivateLink / guardrails / encryption / CloudTrail integration** — Unang non-Azure home ng OpenAI para sa first-party model serving; ang Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI reset ang structural enabling event.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > Foundry Local + Local Inference Runtimes

bullets.body: **Microsoft Foundry Local — GA carry-forward (Apr 9 launch); cross-platform (Windows/Linux/macOS), ~20MB native library, native SDKs (C#/JS/Python/Rust), Foundry Catalog na may hardware-matched model auto-download (GPT-OSS, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mistral, Phi, Whisper), Windows ML (WinML) execution providers; OpenAI request/response format kasama ang OpenAI Responses API** — Ang nawawalang Windows-default integration point para sa compressed-cache utilities.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > vLLM

bullets.body: **vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) carry papuntang Apr 28-May 1 — torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default / Model Runner V2 / day-one Gemma 4 support sa E2B / E4B / 26B MoE / 31B Dense; v0.18.0 gRPC serving + GPU NGram speculative decoding + FlexKV cache offload backend; HuggingFace Transformers v5+ compatibility; CUDA 13.0 default** — Standing reference.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > SGLang

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — nananatiling unpatched papuntang May 1 (~12 araw mula sa disclosure); v0.5.10 ay exploitable pa rin; cross-server class sa vLLM CVE-2025-61620 + LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (parehong model-tooling-layer injection shape sa buong stack)** — Hindi nagbubunga ng upstream fix ang maintainer-coordination; nagpapatuloy na nag-circulate ang PoC; aktibo ang CERT/CC VU#915947.

**SGLang TurboQuant integration — PR #21419 in-tree (`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`); follow-up #23134 fused-Triton-decode/extend kernel rewrite na nakaabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput vs ~1% sa original implementation** — Carry-forward; standing reference para sa compressed-KV-cache deployment-knob trend.

citations.label: GitHub Issue - SGLang #23134 TurboQuant fused Triton kernels

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > llama.cpp / Ollama

bullets.body: **Nagpapatuloy ang llama.cpp build cadence papuntang Apr 28-May 1 — sub-day macOS ARM64/x64, Android, OpenEuler, CUDA binaries; aktibo ang TurboQuant discussion thread #20969 sa `ggml-org/llama.cpp`** — Community evaluation ng 3.5-bit KV-cache compression para sa on-device target.

citations.label: GitHub Discussion - llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant Extreme KV Cache Quantization

bullets.body: **Ollama v0.21.x carry-forward Apr 28-May 1 — `max` think-parameter + improved OpenAI response mapping para sa reasoning effort; Hermes + GitHub Copilot CLI integration sa `ollama launch`; Gemma 4 MLX text-only runtime** — Standing baseline.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > Unsloth

bullets.body: **Unsloth 2026.4.8 (PyPI) carry-forward papuntang Apr 28-May 1 — inference 20-30% mas mabilis (parity sa llama-server / llama.cpp); pinalawak ang GGUF export sa full fine-tunes; auto-detect ng LM Studio / HF / katulad na pre-existing models; mas mabilis na MoE 30B-A3B (17.5GB VRAM) + 235B-A22B; MoE 12x mas mabilis + 35% mas konting VRAM + 6x na mas mahabang context sa pamamagitan ng bagong Triton + math kernels nang walang accuracy loss; Gemma-4-E2B 8GB VRAM training (~1.5x mas mabilis, ~60% mas konting VRAM kaysa FA2); bagong model support DeepSeek-OCR 2 / GLM-4.7-Flash / Kimi-2.5; Unsloth Studio local no-code UI** — Standing on-device fine-tuning baseline kasama ang Bonsai-8B + TurboQuant; ayon sa project memory, hahanapin ang Unsloth sa bawat daily-update run.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > KV-Cache Compression Stack

bullets.body: **TurboQuant (Google Research, ICLR 2026, arxiv 2504.19874) — 3.5-bit-per-value KV-cache compression na kasing-galing ng FP16 sa LongBench / Needle-in-a-Haystack nang walang retraining; 6x compression, 8x mas mabilis na attention; community ports sa MLX + Triton + vLLM + SGLang** — Standing carry-forward.

**PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) — shared asymmetrically-compressed KV-pool para sa multi-agent LLM inference; int8 keys + 3-bit TurboQuant-MSE values sa pamamagitan ng HF DynamicCache injection; sa Llama-3-8B na may 15 agents na nagsa-share ng 4K-token context, kinukulot ang KV-cache memory mula 19.8GB pababa sa 0.45GB (-97.7%)** — Carry-forward.
**NVIDIA kvpress — Decoding-Press maturity; ExpectedAttentionPress na may configurable compression ratios (0.7 / 0.5); AIME25 + Math500 + LongBench benchmarks** — Standing baseline.

**DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash carry-forward Apr 28-May 1; unang DeepSeek release na optimized para sa Huawei Ascend chips** — V4 Pro: 1.6T MoE / 49B active. V4 Flash: 284B / 13B active. 1M context. Binabawasan ng Hybrid Attention ang compute sa 27%/10% ng V3.2 sa 1M-context. Pricing: V4 Flash $0.14/$0.28 per M tokens; V4 Pro $0.145/$3.48.

bullets.body: **LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) — pre-auth SQLi laban sa Authorization header sa /chat/completions; isang row ng litellm_credentials ang nagla-leak ng OpenAI org keys + Anthropic admin tokens + AWS Bedrock IAM credentials nang sabay-sabay; patched sa v1.83.7-stable noong Apr 19; unang naobserbahang exploitation Apr 26 16:17 UTC (~26 oras pagkatapos ng advisory); inotomatiko ng attackers ang origin-IP rotation tuwing 21 minuto** — Ang 2026 LLM-gateway-as-blast-radius case; structurally same shape sa Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter (model-tooling-layer injection sa auth/RAG interface).

bullets.body: **Anthropic 1M context beta retired Apr 30 — kinailangang lumipat ang Sonnet 4.5 / Sonnet 4 users sa Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 para sa 1M context (walang beta header required sa standard pricing); Message Batches API max_tokens cap raised sa 300k para sa Opus 4.6 / Sonnet 4.6** — Kahapon ang deadline; mag-fa-fail sa deployment ang mga users na hindi naka-migrate mula May 1.

**GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5 Pro carry-forward (released Apr 23; API Apr 24 sa $5/M input, $30/M output, 1M context); ChatGPT Plus/Pro/Business/Enterprise + Codex; CarPlay voice access; Fast answers; tinatarget ng OpenAI ang 122M paid subscribers by 2026 sa bagong $8/month plan; ad pilot sa $100M annualized within weeks (projection: $2.4-$2.5B in 2026)** — Standing carry.

**Anthropic Opus 4.7 GA carry-forward (Apr 16) — pricing $5/M input, $25/M output; magagamit sa Claude products + API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry; Anthropic-Sydney office binuksan Apr 27 na may Theo Hourmouzis bilang ANZ GM** — Standing carry.

**Apr 30 Simon Willison weblog wave — "We need RSS for sharing abundant vibe-coded apps", "Codex CLI 0.128.0 adds /goal", "The Zig project's rationale for their firm anti-AI contribution policy", "A quote from Andrew Kelley" sa LLM PRs vs human mistakes** — Ang Zig anti-AI policy ang structural piece (unang major systems-language project na nagbawal nang categorically sa LLM-assisted contributions).
**Anthropic-NEC Japan partnership Apr 24 carry-forward — itinatayo ang pinakamalaking AI engineering workforce sa Japan** — Standing reference.

**Western/Chinese open-weight catch-up — DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1 pinaliit ang gap mula "months to days"; Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ + Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI reset nagdaragdag ng tape catalysts** — Standing carry papuntang Mag 7 super-week + Cerebras IPO.
